case_title: HODGKINS, CHARLES vs. THREATHER, STRAND et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-30-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY MARTIN CRAIG. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. HEARING SET FOR FEB-09-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
